mapper.sql: select unit_id, course_id, unit_name, unit_order, description, total_lessons, total_duration, is_locked, passing_score, experience_reward, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag from edu_course_unit where del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: and course_id = #{courseId} order by unit_order asc
mapper.insert: insert into edu_course_unit ( course_id, unit_name, unit_order, description, total_lessons, total_duration, is_locked, passing_score, experience_reward, create_by, create_time, del_flag ) values ( #{courseId}, #{unitName}, #{unitOrder}, #{description}, #{totalLessons}, #{totalDuration}, #{isLocked}, #{passingScore}, #{experienceReward}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), '0' )
mapper.delete: update edu_course_unit set del_flag = '1' where unit_id = #{unitId}

update edu_course_unit set del_flag = '1' where unit_id in
#{unitId}
